name: playhub-lyl-sync
description: Lambda for the weekly LYL Veo recording-assignment sync

scripts.package: npm run build && rm -rf dist/node_modules && mkdir -p dist/node_modules && cp -r node_modules/playwright-core dist/node_modules/ && rm -f dist.zip && cd dist && zip -r ../dist.zip .
scripts.deploy: npm run package && cd ../../terraform && AWS_PROFILE=playhub terraform apply -target=aws_lambda_function.lyl_sync -auto-approve
